---
title: "Identifying Euroscepticism Using a Text-As-Data Approach: An Experimental Study Employing Parliamentary Speeches"
author: "Djouvas, C., Christodoulou, C., Charalampous, A., and Ioannidis, N."
date: 2023-01-01
description: "18th IEEE International Workshop on Semantic and Social Media Adaptation & Personalization (SMAP 2023)"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
